meaning: Metallic Al fraction in prepared scrap
rationale: Captures prepared-scrap heterogeneity/contamination while keeping the central case as effectively metallic.
Represents incomplete conversion due to passivation/contact/solids-handling non-idealities.
Encodes electrolyte retention/bleed as a first-order operational lever without introducing speculative regeneration.

meaning: Scrap preparation yield into hydrolysis feed
rationale: Captures handling rejects, sorting losses, and fines/dust removal prior to the reactor.
Aligns Stage D to usable hydrogen rather than crude gas.
Represents reactor solids loading/dilution and liquor handling intensity.
Aggregates mixing/pumping/solids handling/controls required at scale.
Represents cooling/heat-management auxiliaries rather than assuming free exotherm control.
